/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaruco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libaruco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/aruco_msgs/msg/marker__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/aruco_msgs/msg/marker_array__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/giorgio/Webots/build/aruco_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libaruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
